nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI mostly for research and as an aid while I'm writing. I've never used AI for help coming up with an original idea

nodes.label: AI for low-stakes tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For something that is higher stakes to me, like writing a pitch that may possibly land a TV series deal for my company, it's more like 20-25% AI assisted writing/research

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I've had AI hallucinate events in history while researching TV shows, which was frustrating

nodes.label: AI integration into existing software
nodes.label_negative: AI as separate tool requiring extra effort
nodes.grounding_span: I hope in the future that AI will be more integrated into the software (like the editing softwares I mentioned) I use for my job

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: Idea generation I prefer to do myself. I am more happy with the results when I do it this way

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it saves a lot of time

nodes.label: Professional writing skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: being a good writer is my most important professional skill

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: My most satisfying experiences have been when I can give a list of 4-5 examples of things I've researched and AI can write the short blurbs

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: I've had AI hallucinate events in history while researching TV shows, which was frustrating

nodes.label: Positive view of AI as idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I've never used AI for help coming up with an original idea

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I hope in the future that AI will be more integrated into the software

nodes.label: Domain-specific calibration of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: For something that is higher stakes to me, like writing a pitch that may possibly land a TV series deal for my company, it's more like 20-25% AI assisted writing/research

nodes.label: Boundary-setting between core and peripheral creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Idea generation I prefer to do myself. I am more happy with the results when I do it this way
